heading: Indians eligible for loans
label: 5132 Indians eligible for loans
text: On and after , no individual of less than one-quarter degree of Indian blood shall be eligible for a loan from funds made available in accordance with the provisions of the Act of () [ et seq.], and the Act of ().May 10, 1939June 18, 1934June 26, 193648 Stat. 98625 U.S.C. 510149 Stat. 1967
notes: References in TextAct of , referred to in text, is , , popularly known as the Indian Reorganization Act, which is classified generally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.
